query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workshop_bookings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  bookingNumber VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  workshopId INT NOT NULL,
  userId INT,
  customerName VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  customerEmail VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  customerPhone VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  ticketCount INT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  attendeeNames TEXT,
  unitPrice INT NOT NULL,
  totalAmount INT NOT NULL,
  paymentStatus ENUM('pending', 'completed', 'failed', 'refunded') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  paymentMethod ENUM('razorpay', 'cash'),
  razorpayOrderId VARCHAR(100),
  razorpayPaymentId VARCHAR(100),
  paidAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'confirmed', 'cancelled', 'attended', 'no_show') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  specialRequirements TEXT,
  adminNotes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

  adminNotes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
